svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="raOUhyVXt4TiQKvDIIsw"> <mxGraphModel dx="1414" dy="841" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "graph TD
 %% ==========================================
 %% DIAGRAMA DE ARQUITECTURA DE RED SEGURA - BANCO
 %% Actividad Academica - Grupo 3
 %% ==========================================

 subgraph PERIMETRO[\"ZONA DE PERIMETRO EXTERNO\"]
 INET((\"INTERNET<br/>Clientes / Publico General\"))
 VPN[/\"Tunel VPN Site-to-Site<br/>Sucursales Remotas\"/]
 end

 subgraph NUCLEO[\"NUCLEO DE SEGURIDAD PERIMETRAL\"]
 FW{{\"NGFW<br/>FIREWALL DE NUEVA GENERACION<br/>(Punto Unico de Inspeccion)\"}}
 IDS[[\"IDS / IPS<br/>Sistema de Deteccion de Intrusos<br/>(Monitoreo - SPAN Port)\"]]
 end

 subgraph DMZ[\"ZONA DESMILITARIZADA (DMZ)\"]
 WEB((\"Servidor Banca en Linea<br/>Plataforma Web Transaccional\"))
 end

 subgraph OFICINAS[\"RED INTERNA - OFICINAS ADMINISTRATIVAS\"]
 SW_OFI[/\"Switch de Distribucion<br/>Oficinas\"/]
 PC_EMP((\"PCs Empleados<br/>Operacion Diaria\"))
 PC_GER((\"PCs Gerencia<br/>Acceso Administrativo\"))
 end

 subgraph CRITICA[\"RED CRITICA AISLADA - ALTA SEGURIDAD\"]
 SW_CORE[/\"Switch Core<br/>Segmento Air-Gapped Logico\"/]
 DB[(\"Datacenter<br/>Base de Datos Principal<br/>(Core Bancario)\")]
 ATM((\"Cajeros Automaticos<br/>Red ATM Dedicada\"))
 end

 %% ==========================================
 %% FLUJO DE CONEXIONES CON REGLAS DE FIREWALL
 %% ==========================================

 INET ==>|\"Permitir SOLO HTTPS<br/>Puerto 443 - Inspeccion SSL\"| FW
 VPN ==>|\"Trafico Cifrado IPSec<br/>Autenticacion Mutua\"| FW

 FW -.->|\"Espejo de Trafico<br/>(Port Mirroring)\"| IDS
 IDS -.->|\"Alertas en Tiempo Real<br/>Bloqueo Automatico\"| FW

 FW ==>|\"Permitir SOLO HTTPS<br/>Denegar todo lo demas\"| WEB

 FW ==>|\"Salida a Internet Filtrada<br/>Proxy Web / Control de Contenido\"| SW_OFI
 SW_OFI --> PC_EMP
 SW_OFI --> PC_GER

 FW ==>|\"BLOQUEO TOTAL desde Oficinas<br/>Sin excepcion directa\"| SW_CORE

 WEB -.->|\"Consulta Autorizada y Auditada<br/>Puerto 1433/3306 - Solo Lectura\"| SW_CORE

 SW_CORE --> DB
 SW_CORE ==>|\"Protocolo Cifrado Propietario<br/>Canal Dedicado ATM\"| ATM

 %% ==========================================
 %% ESTILOS PROFESIONALES (classDef)
 %% ==========================================

 classDef perimetro fill:#37474f,stroke:#1c262b,stroke-width:2px,color:#ffffff,font-weight:bold,rx:8,ry:8
 classDef nucleo fill:#4a148c,stroke:#1a0033,stroke-width:3px,color:#ffffff,font-weight:bold,rx:8,ry:8
 classDef dmz fill:#ff9800,stroke:#e65100,stroke-width:2px,color:#1a1a1a,font-weight:bold,rx:8,ry:8
 classDef oficinas fill:#1565c0,stroke:#0d47a1,stroke-width:2px,color:#ffffff,font-weight:bold,rx:8,ry:8
 classDef critica fill:#8b0000,stroke:#4a0000,stroke-width:3px,color:#ffffff,font-weight:bold,rx:8,ry:8

 class INET,VPN perimetro
 class FW,IDS nucleo
 class WEB dmz
 class SW_OFI,PC_EMP,PC_GER oficinas
 class SW_CORE,DB,ATM critica

 style PERIMETRO fill:#eceff1,stroke:#455a64,stroke-width:2px
 style NUCLEO fill:#ede7f6,stroke:#4a148c,stroke-width:2px
 style DMZ fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#e65100,stroke-width:2px
 style OFICINAS fill:#e3f2fd,stroke:#0d47a1,stroke-width:2px
 style CRITICA fill:#ffebee,stroke:#8b0000,stroke-width:3px",
 "config": null
}" id="mV-ksIXwEmNgvF4IsC9P-28"> <mxCell connectable="0" parent="1" style="group;transparentBounds=1;editIcon=1;lockedGroup=0;groupPadding=20;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="ZONA DE PERIMETRO EXTERNO" mermaidId="n:PERIMETRO" mermaidBaseStyle="html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;verticalAlign=top;fillColor=#eceff1;strokeColor=#455a64;fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);fontFamily=Trebuchet MS,Verdana,Arial,sans-serif;fontSize=16;" mermaidBaseValue="ZONA DE PERIMETRO EXTERNO" id="mV-ksIXwEmNgvF4IsC9P-29"> <mxCell parent="mV-ksIXwEmNgvF4IsC9P-28" style="html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;verticalAlign=top;fillColor=#eceff1;strokeColor=#455a64;fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);fontFamily=Trebuchet MS,Verdana,Arial,sans-serif;fontSize=16;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="289" width="551" x="519" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="INTERNET
